data.content: The project uses **MSTest v3.8.0** with the Microsoft Testing Platform enabled (`TestingPlatformDotnetTestSupport=true`). Integration tests are tagged with `[TestCategory("Integration")]`. Let me run them.

toolRequests.name: bash

arguments.description: Run integration tests filtered by TestCategory

toolRequests.intentionSummary: Run integration tests filtered by TestCategory

data.reasoningText:
The project uses **MSTest** (v3.8.0) with the Microsoft Testing Platform (`TestingPlatformDotnetTestSupport` is set to `true` in `Directory.Build.props`). The integration tests are tagged with `[TestCategory("Integration")]`.

With the Microsoft Testing Platform and `dotnet test`, I can filter by category using `--filter "TestCategory=Integration"`.

arguments.description: Run integration tests filtered by TestCategory

toolCalls.name: bash
toolCalls.args: {"command": "cd /tmp/sv-ab8c7cbaad2845648c362c2cffa8c95c && dotnet test --filter \"TestCategory=Integration\" 2>&1", "description": "Run integration tests filtered by TestCategory", "initial_wait": 60}
